description.name: BlueOnyx (APIv2)
description.tagline: Go blue and use the popular open source web hosting control panel.
description.short: BlueOnyx is a popular web hosting control panel and traces its roots back to BlueQuartz and the Cobalt RaQs.
description.long:
Fully integrated with WHMCS for the best possible experience between web hosting control panel and billing platform.

Supports BlueOnyx 5210R, 5211R and 5212R.

* Automatic Account Creation
* Automatic Suspension/Termination/Upgrades
* Email Account Creation
* Single Sign-On for one-click transition

[Learn more »](https://www.blueonyx.it/api-v2-documentation)
